title: Philadelphia Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Philadelphia with a Z-Score of +3.37. The city's heat wave has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Philadelphia has led to a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD), reaching 10.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 46%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 12.7 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to protect the public and infrastructure.
